headline: Therapeutics Stocks Q1 Recap: Benchmarking Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRTX)
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the therapeutics stocks, including Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRTX) and its peers.

headline: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Has One Of The Widest And Most Durable Moats In Biotech
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated offers predictable CF cash flows and pipeline catalysts in pain, hematology & renal (Pove for IgAN). Click for this VRTX update.

headline: IBM, Verizon, Corning And A Health Care Stock On CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
summary: Jim Lebenthal recommends Vertex Pharmaceuticals in the healthcare sector. Jenny Van Leeuwen picks Verizon, IBM is down 18%, Joseph Terranova chooses Corning.
